title: MS.1 SR.1 — Medical Staff Credentialing
description: The hospital must ensure that all members of the medical staff are credentialed and privileged in accordance with the medical staff bylaws.

title: IC.1 SR.1 — Infection Prevention Program
description: The hospital must have an active, hospital-wide infection prevention and control program with defined policies and procedures.

title: QM.1 SR.1 — Quality Management System
description: The hospital must develop, implement, and maintain an effective data-driven quality management system.

title: PE.1 SR.3 — Patient Assessment and Reassessment
description: The hospital must ensure patients receive an initial assessment and ongoing reassessments by qualified individuals.

title: MM.1 SR.2 — Medication Management Policies
description: The hospital must have policies and procedures for safe medication management including ordering, dispensing, administration, and monitoring.

title: 482.21 — QAPI Program (CMS CoP)
description: The hospital must develop, implement, and maintain an effective, ongoing, hospital-wide, data-driven quality assessment and performance improvement program.

title: 482.42 — Infection Prevention and Control (CMS CoP)
description: The hospital must provide a sanitary environment to avoid sources and transmission of infections and communicable diseases.

title: LD.1 SR.1 — Leadership and Governance
description: The governing body must ensure the hospital is in compliance with all applicable federal, state, and local laws and regulations.
